headline: Chipotle’s Recipe For Growth Links New Proteins To Catering Push
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) introduced its "Recipe for Growth" transformation plan, centered on new protein limited time offers and upgraded kitchen equipment. The company is also moving to grow catering and group sales, an area it describes as underpenetrated in its current business mix. The plan marks an operational shift beyond adding new restaurants and small menu updates, with the goal of supporting traffic and higher margin group occasions. Chipotle, known for its fast casual...

headline: TD Cowen Satisfied With Chipotle Mexican Grill’s (CMG) Progress
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG) is one of the 7 Best Restaurant Stocks to Buy for Growth in 2026. On March 20, TD Cowen analyst Andrew Charles maintained his $44 price target on Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG) and reiterated his Buy rating. This is close to the average price target on CMG of $45.39, […]

headline: 2 Restaurant Stocks to Consider Right Now and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Restaurants are go-to meeting hubs for friends, family, and colleagues. But it’s not all sunshine and rainbows as they’re notoriously hard to run thanks to perishable ingredients, labor shortages, or volatile consumer spending. Unfortunately, these factors have spelled trouble for the industry as it has shed 8% over the past six months. This drop was worse than the S&P 500’s 1% fall.
